name: Can I get Siri to cite my pages for multiple cities at once?
description: Yes, but only if each city page has unique, useful local information.

mainEntity.name: Can I get Siri to cite my pages for multiple cities at once?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you offer services in multiple cities, use separate pages only when each page has genuinely distinct local information. Generic copy swapped between cities can hurt trust and make it harder for Siri to identify the real location signal. Strong local pages should include unique service details, service areas, and contact information.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, but only if each city page has unique, useful local information.
